title: tilia paucicostata var. yunnanensis
intro: Tilia paucicostata var. yunnanensis, also known as the Yunnan Tilia or Yunnan Lime Tree, is a plant species within the Tilia genus, belonging to the family Malvaceae. This deciduous tree is native to the mountainous regions of Yunnan Province in China and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bark, leaves, and flowers of the Yunnan Lime Tree have been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Tilia paucicostata var. yunnanensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms associated with allergies and asthma.
